### Supported Platforms
- **macOS** Apple Silicon (ARM64) - `.dmg`
- **macOS** Intel (x64) - `.dmg`
- **Windows** (x64) - `.exe`
- **Linux** (x64) - `.deb` / `.AppImage`

### Requirements
- **HTTPS interception**: Install the Proxie root CA certificate from the in-app Setup page and trust it on the system / device you want to capture traffic from.
- **macOS / Windows**: No external tools needed.
- **Linux**: Run the AppImage or install the `.deb` package; ensure your system trust store is updated after importing the CA.
